scripts.check: pnpm validate:json && pnpm check:schema-fixtures && pnpm check:tool-descriptors && pnpm check:dashboard && pnpm check:company-os
scripts.check:dashboard: tsc -p apps/agent-dashboard/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node apps/agent-dashboard/tests/mission-wave-live-merge-check.mjs && node apps/agent-dashboard/tests/team-selectors-check.mjs && node apps/agent-dashboard/tests/workflow-diagnosis-check.mjs && node apps/agent-dashboard/tests/workbench-visual-fixture-check.mjs && vite build --config apps/agent-dashboard/vite.config.ts
scripts.acceptance:company-os:approval-browser: node scripts/seed-company-os-trademark-v1.mjs --capture --capture-contract v2.2 --capture-approval-action --approval-action-decision approved --run-id company-os-approval-action-approved-v1 && node scripts/seed-company-os-trademark-v1.mjs --capture --capture-contract v2.2 --capture-approval-action --approval-action-decision rejected --run-id company-os-approval-action-rejected-v1
scripts.test:multi-project: cargo test -p harness-core project -- --nocapture && cargo test -p harness-cli --test project_registry --test project_resolution --test init_project --test workflow_cwd --test workflow_project_options --test global_project_workflow --test delivery_project_context --test codex_delivery_cwd --test claude_delivery_cwd --test serve_projects_api --test serve_sse_projects --test project_convergence --test project_cli --test project_migrate --test store_source
scripts.acceptance:mission-wave: cargo test -p harness-cli --test mission_wave_api --test team_run_api --test team_run_start --test mcp_stdio -- --test-threads=1 && pnpm check:dashboard
